Headline: #39 Pershing Temporary Reroute at Indiana & 40th
ShortDescription: 39 Pershing buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Indiana & 40th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
39 Pershing buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 39th, Prairie, 41st, State, Pershing, over regular route due to street blockage near Indiana & 40th. 

Southbound in reverse

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #4 Cottage Grove, #X4 Cottage Grove Express and #1 Bronzeville/Union Station Temporary Northbound Reroute near 35th/Indiana
ShortDescription: NB #4 Cottage Grove, #X4 Cottage Grove Express and #1 Bronzeville Union Station buses are temporarily rerouted, due to street blockage near 35th/Indiana.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #4 Cottage Grove, #X4 Cottage Grove Express and # 1 Bronzeville/Union Station buses are temporarily rerouted via 35th, State, 31st, Indiana and over normal route, due to street blockage near 35th/Indiana.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Midway-bound Orange Line Delays
ShortDescription: Midway-bound Orange Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier mechanical problem at Archer. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Midway-bound Orange Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier mechanical problem at Archer

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
